final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial infographic poster for a Chinese lifestyle brand, a 3×3 nine-grid layout optimized for Xiaohongshu (RED) publication, portrait 3:4 ratio, designed to be sliced into 9 individual square cards.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design with light skeuomorphic illustration accents, ins-style healing aesthetic, magazine-grade new-media layout, professional knowledge-sharing infographic in the spirit of top-tier Xiaohongshu viral covers
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout, each cell clearly separated by thin visible borders or consistent gutters, every cell self-contained and centered so content remains fully readable after cropping; no text or title placed near grid dividing lines; generous internal padding per cell
Subject: nine individual sleep-tip cards unified by a single visual language — cream white backgrounds, soft illustration icons, large legible Chinese headings, short body copy; each cell functions as an independent Xiaohongshu image card
Scene/backdrop: pure cream-white to light oat canvas overall; each cell has its own soft warm micro-background (subtle gradient or flat wash) in the palette range; no busy patterns behind text
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, healing, calm — like morning light through linen curtains; no harsh shadows; gentle and premium
Color palette: primary tones are 奶油白 (cream white), 浅米色 (light beige), 淡燕麦色 (pale oat), 浅焦糖色 (light caramel); deep brown (#3B2314 range) used exclusively for body text and fine details; small accent warmth from candlelight amber; palette is cohesive and gentle across all nine cells
Materials/textures: flat vector illustration style with subtle paper-like warmth; no glossy plastic; soft linen feel
Text (verbatim): Cell 1 — large title: "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips"，副标题: "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏"；Cell 2 — "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" / "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。"；Cell 3 — "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" / "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。"；Cell 4 — "3. 房间温度别太高" / "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。"；Cell 5 — "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" / "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。"；Cell 6 — "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。"；Cell 7 — "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。"；Cell 8 — "7. 固定上床时间" / "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。"；Cell 9 — "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" / "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" / 底部小字: "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: all text must be Chinese only — no English, no garbled characters; grid lines or gutters must be clearly visible to guide post-production cropping; each cell must be visually complete and balanced independently; illustration icons per cell: Cell 1 = soft bed, crescent moon, pillow, sleep mask; Cell 2 = smartphone, moon, sleepy face doodle; Cell 3 = bedside lamp, warm yellow glow, curtains; Cell 4 = air conditioner, thermometer, duvet; Cell 5 = coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol; Cell 6 = bathroom steam, towel, hot water; Cell 7 = notebook, fountain pen, small desk lamp; Cell 8 = clock, moon, bed; Cell 9 = breath-wave lines, closed-eye figure, stars; female-oriented wellness aesthetic throughout
Avoid: cheap marketing feel, over-decorated backgrounds, English text, garbled or missing Chinese characters, text placed on grid dividing lines, inconsistent cell styles, neon colors, dark mode, heavy drop shadows, busy gradients, watermarks, Behance generic flat style, 8K stuffer labels
